rationale: Educ. Code §44.902 governs school district long-range energy plans to reduce electric consumption. It is wholly unrelated to the residence homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The board of trustees of a school district shall establish a long-range energy plan to reduce the district's annual electric consumption by five percent beginning with the 2008 state fiscal year
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this energy planning statute.
